content: Cerebras model emits fullwidth Unicode brackets 【1】 (U+3010/U+3011) for citations, not ASCII [1]. parseCitations regex must handle both: split on /(\[\d+\]|【\d+】)/g and match with ?? fallback.

name: source-dedup
description: useChat hook can accumulate duplicate source-url parts across re-renders. Always deduplicate by sourceId before rendering SourceCards.
